notes: v254 — Every lesson now ends with a Quick Quiz. 44 questions across all 21 lessons, in the same plain-English voice as the course. Tap an answer and the explanation appears either way — it teaches rather than tests, and wrong guesses cost nothing. Answer every question in a lesson and it earns a '✓ passed' badge the app remembers, so you can see at a glance which lessons you've truly finished. Try lesson 1: three questions in, you'll know what a share actually is, where prices come from, and what end-of-day means — and you'll never forget that volume is the lie detector.
